package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for repository_or_service_packages_import_docs_or_generator_annotations: Core business packages that depend on documentation-only tooling or generator-specific concerns.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule131NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule131NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule131NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario131Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule131NegativeService, input Rule131NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
